user.title: Connect to Russound CAM6.6
user.description: Enter the address of your RS-232 to TCP bridge.

data_description.host: IP address of the serial-to-TCP bridge (e.g. USR device)
data_description.port: TCP port the bridge listens on

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the IP address and port, and make sure the bridge is powered on.
